creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 168301
py-scriptine.shar

The primary goal of scriptine is to make it easy to write shell scripts with python.

Add new port sysutils/py-scriptine:
	- portlint compliant
	- poudriere tests ok
